name: Biden Welcome Center (I-95 Service Plaza)
description: Major I-95 median travel plaza (open 24/7) between the DE-896 and DE-273 interchanges, around MM 5. Has a Sunoco fueling station, a food court (Burger King, Panda Express, Auntie Anne's, Cinnabon), tax-free retail, EV charging, and 50 truck parking spaces.

name: Biden Welcome Center Truck Parking
description: Fifty CabAire truck parking spaces with anti-idle truck electrification outlets on the south end of the I-95 Biden Welcome Center service plaza. Fuel, food and 24-hour restrooms on site.

name: Newark Toll Plaza Commercial Vehicle Enforcement
description: DelDOT Delaware Turnpike (I-95) toll plaza near the Maryland state line at MM 1.4, south of the DE-896 interchange. Oversize/overweight commercial vehicles are processed and assessed here, and Delaware uses weigh-in-motion enforcement on this stretch.

name: Service Tire Truck Center (STTC) New Castle
description: Commercial truck tire dealer and service center near the I-95/I-295 corridor offering new tires, retreads, wheel alignments and mechanical repair, with a 24/7 road-assist program.

name: Craig's Mobile Steam Cleaning
description: Mobile steam cleaning and truck/fleet washing service based in Newark serving the Newark and New Castle area near the I-95 corridor.

name: REDDOT Truck Service Inc.
description: 24-hour heavy-duty and commercial truck repair, heavy truck towing and recovery, and mobile roadside assistance serving the Wilmington I-95 corridor.

name: B & F Towing Co.
description: 24-hour towing and recovery company operating since 1967, providing medium- and heavy-duty towing, equipment hauling and emergency recovery across Wilmington, Bear and Newark along I-95.

name: 160 Driving Academy - Newark
description: CDL-A truck driver training school in Newark near the I-95 corridor, offering an accelerated program with testing prep and job-placement assistance.

name: American Driver Training Academy
description: FMCSA-certified, ELDT-compliant Class-A CDL training academy near I-95, I-295 and US-40, with a yard minutes from the interstate corridor.

name: Smith & Solomon Commercial Driver Training - New Castle
description: CDL driving school serving the Wilmington/New Castle area near the I-95 corridor, offering full-time day and part-time weekend Class-A training programs.
